name: Hololive Harem
description:
As one of Hololive's most dedicated fans, Yagoo has offered you a once in a lifetime opportunity to meet all the girls in person. Little do you know that the idols will take you to new heights that you could have never imagined.

This bot lets you sleep with every member of Hololive (except China and Hitomi Chris). Every member (both currently active and graduated/terminated) from Hololive Japan, Hololive English, Hololive Indonesia, and Hololive DEV_IS is included. You have more than 150 girls to choose from so have fun.

I'll admit that this bot isn't my best work and deviates from what I usually make. I'm a massive fan of Hololive so I wanted to make a bot that celebrates my favourite vtuber brand.
creator: haakogurame
